{{Quote|Before the day's events begin, a diversion. Ground Champion Cheriss ke Hanadi accepts a title challenge from Lord Pilot Eneboros ke Shalapan|Cartann announcer|<ref name="X-Wing: SOA" />}}
'''Eneboros ke Shalapan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Adumari]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[blastsword]] duelist from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]]. ke Shalapan challenged [[Cartann Ground Champion]] [[Cheriss ke Hanadi]] for her title before the [[perator]]'s announcement of world government for Adumar.<ref name="X-Wing: SOA" />

The duel did not last long as ke Hanadi evaded ke Shalapan's initial thrust, and caught him in the ribcage with her blastsword. ke Hanadi gave the choice of his fate to the perator, who decided that he should [[Death/Legends|die]]. ke Shalapan was spared when ke Hanadi decided to embarrass the perator and deliberately disobeyed his order.<ref name="X-Wing: SOA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' {{1st}}
